upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Generally favourable may signify a good marriage.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A good harvest, which may be taken in several senses.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Goodwill towards the Querent, but without the opportunity to exercise it.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A bad card; according to some readings, alienation.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: For a woman, marriage, but probably frustrated.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Young man of family in search of young lady.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Difficulties and contradictions, if near a good card.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Generally speaking, a bad card.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Domestic disputes for a married person.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A dark child.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Servants may lose the confidence of their masters; a young lady may be betrayed by a friend.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Success in financial speculation.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Quarrels may be turned to advantage.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Unexpected good fortune.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A married woman will have beautiful children.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A very good card; collaboration will favour enterprise.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A young lady may expect trivial disappointments.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Calamities of all kinds.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Beware of ill-will on the part of a man of position, and of hypocrisy pretending to help.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Sometimes denotes a woman of equivocal character.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A rich marriage for a man and a distinguished one for a woman.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A visit from a friend, who will bring unexpected money to the Querent.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Good augury; also a young man who is unfortunate in love.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: For a male Querent, a good marriage and one beyond his expectations.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Of good augury for military men.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Marriage with a fair woman.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Fair child; idea, design, resolve, movement.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Success, if accompanied by the Three of Cups.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Pleasant memories.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Generally favourable; a happy marriage; also patrimony, legacies, gifts, success in enterprise.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Return of some relative who has not been seen for long.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Contrarieties.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Unexpected advancement for a military man.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Consolation, cure, end of the business.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Favourable in things of pleasure and business, as well as love; also wealth and honour.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Inflexible will, unalterable law.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A lawyer, senator, doctor.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A bad man; also a caution to put an end to a ruinous lawsuit.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A widow.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A bad woman, with ill-will towards the Querent.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A soldier, man of arms, satellite, stipendiary; heroic action predicted for soldier.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Dispute with an imbecile person; for a woman, struggle with a rival, who will be conquered.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: An indiscreet person will pry into the Querent's secrets.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Followed by Ace and King, imprisonment; for girl or wife, treason on the part of friends.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Victory and consequent fortune for a soldier in war.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: An ecclesiastic, a priest; generally, a card of bad omen.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Good ground for suspicion against a doubtful person.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: For a woman, scandal spread in her respect.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Dark girl; a good card; it promises a country life after a competence has been secured.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: The voyage will be pleasant.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: An attack on the fortune of the Querent.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A sign of sorrow and mourning.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A bad card, but if reversed a qualified success may be expected by wise administration of affairs.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A certain success following wise administration.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: For a woman, the flight of her lover.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A meeting with one whom the Querent has compromised; also a nun.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Gifts for a lady, influential protection for a man in search of help.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Great prosperity or great misery.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: Marriage broken off, for a woman, through her own imprudence.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A rather dark man, a merchant, master, professor.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Dark woman; presents from a rich relative; rich and happy marriage for a young man.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: An useful man; useful discoveries.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A brave man out of employment.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A dark youth; a young officer or soldier; a child.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Represents house or dwelling, and derives its value from other cards.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: An occasion which may be fortunate or otherwise.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Prompt fulfilment of what is presaged by neighbouring cards.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: A young man in business who has relations with the Querent; a dark girl.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: The Querent will be compromised in a matter of money-lending.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Improved position for a lady's future husband.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: The present must not be relied on.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A check on the Querent's ambition.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Conquest of fortune by reason.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: For a bachelor, pleasant news from a lady.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: If for a man, celebrity for his eldest son.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: Troubles are more imaginary than real.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)

upright_additional_meaning_verbatim: The most favourable of all cards.
reversed_additional_meaning_verbatim: A share in the finding of treasure.
source_title: A. E. Waite, The Pictorial Key to the Tarot, Part III §4
license: Public domain in US (Sacred Texts/Wikisource public-domain notice)
